turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
My HVAC is blowing warm air and I want a technician.
I can help get a technician for your HVAC that's blowing warm air. What's your zip code so I can find someone nearby?
Thanks. I've checked for HVAC technicians covering 99999, and unfortunately there are none available in that area right now.
There's no one covering 99999 for HVAC at the moment. What I can do is log your request and reach out the moment a technician opens up near you.
Okay, please let me know when someone's available.
Will do — your HVAC service request for zip 99999 is logged, and we'll contact you as soon as a technician is available nearby. Thanks for your patience.

symptoms.description: blowing warm air instead of cool air
